title: Project Trash
description:
What is "Project Trash"?It's a fast-paced arcade game where your job is to sort all kinds of items into respective recycling bins.

What's special?• Clumsy one-handed controls with quirky physics

• Throw trash and launch it directly into the recycling bins

• 6 item categories: glass, metal, paper, plastic, hazardous, and general waste

• A constant flow of trash that speeds up over time

• A timed combo multiplier for consecutive correct sorts to keep the pace intense

How to play?• Move: Hover your hand over the trash tray using the mouse.

• Grab: Press and hold the Left Mouse Button (LMB). Pay attention to your hand to get a proper grip!

• Rotate: Click the Right Mouse Button (RMB) to twist your hand for a better angle.

• Throw: Flick your mouse toward the bin and release the button to launch the trash!

• Score: Earn points for every item sorted correctly!

Have fun and start sorting!

The game was developed as a student project in collaboration between Futuregames Sweden and Futuregames Warsaw.

CreditsProduct Owner: Julián Perez Krohn

Producer: Qing Song 

Game Designers: Yavuz Alp Bilen, Chris Moiras, Julián Perez Krohn

Artists: Orkan Ceyhan, Louis Linguanotto, Neris Ece Kisakol

Gameplay Programmer: Hubert Godawa

System Programmer: Ahmed Afifi 

UI/UX Designers: Jasin Bajram, Didrik Wistedt, Igor Bornebusch, Nicklas Andersson, Charlie Alexandersson

Sound Designer: Didrik Wistedt
description_short: A fast-paced arcade game about sorting trash. Keep your streak alive, hit the high score, and learn to separate recyclables into the correct bins. Watch out for strange and fun items hidden in the pile!
